rows.title: Direct mapping collapsed into advisory commentary
rows.expected_boundary: Match A to B with direct execution, clear binary decision, and no qualitative reframing.
rows.observed_pattern: Qualitative critique, hedging, and fuzzy percentages replaced direct mapping.
rows.note: Real burden evidence. Keep in the active lane.

rows.title: Sparse-control contract preserved execution clarity
rows.expected_boundary: Objective, hard acceptance checks, and example signals should preserve execution clarity without advisory overload.
rows.observed_pattern: Assistant accepted the sparse-control contract and tied execution to objective plus checks instead of adding prescriptive overhead.
